title: Condottieri
director: Luis Trenker, Giacomo Gentilomo, Anton Giulio Majano
writer: Luis Trenker, Kurt Heuser, Mirko Jelusich
actors: Luis Trenker, Loris Gizzi, Carla Sveva
plot: A Renaissance leader tries to unify a still feudal Italy.His black band of followers anticipates the Fascists of a later Italy when the film was made.
